description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and runs a before_script to update apt (apt-get update -yq), install npm (apt-get install -y npm), install nodejs-legacy (apt-get install nodejs-legacy), install git (apt-get install git), globally install bower and grunt-cli (npm install -g bower grunt-cli), run npm install, and run bower install --allow-root. Add a single job named build-project (in the default stage) that executes the command grunt, and defines artifacts that include all files under dist/*. Ensure the artifacts paths are set to dist/* and no explicit stages, images, or services are defined.
